employee.title: Employee Entity
employee.desc: Generic internal worker structure for capturing standard staff records, salaries, and employment timelines.
employee.flowDesc: Verifies worker credentials, fires compliance check integrations, generates employment documents, and configures corporate accounts.

nodes.label: Verify Documents
nodes.details: Validates identification documents, verifying tax status and eligibility.

nodes.label: Background Check
nodes.details: Automated background and security compliance screening check via web hook.

nodes.label: Passed Screening?
nodes.details: Conditional check routing execution based on background clearance status.

nodes.label: Sign Contract
nodes.details: Sends digital employment agreements to candidate. execution waits until completed.

nodes.label: IT Account Setup
nodes.details: Triggers Okta API workflows to create company logins and access controls.

steps.log: Starting Employee Onboarding Process for candidate...
HR Generalist triggered task: Verification of physical credentials docs...
Verify Documents task completed: valid status confirmed.
Webhook triggered: POST https://api.checkr.com/v1/verify...
Webhook response: 200 OK. Clearance status: 'cleared'.
Conditional Gate: evaluating clearance status == 'cleared'. Condition satisfied.
Pending User action: Waiting for document signature capture...
Candidate signed contract document key: 'doc_552912_signed'.
Webhook triggered: POST https://api.okta.com/v1/users...
Webhook response: 201 Created. okta_id: 'usr_abc8921'.
Employee Onboarding Workflow complete. Record status changed to 'active'.

client.title: Client Entity
client.desc: Corporate or individual buyer database schema capturing demographics, industry classification, and billing specifications.
client.flowDesc: Screens customer prospects against compliance lists, auto-registers customer profiles, and generates portal access.

nodes.label: KYC Screener
nodes.details: Fires automated sanction screening search check matching AML requirements.

nodes.label: Clear?
nodes.details: Validates screening output to route client approvals.

nodes.label: Assign Rep
nodes.details: Manual assignment of matching Account Manager based on region/industry.

nodes.label: Welcome Setup
nodes.details: Drafts and executes welcome templates containing portal login linkages.

steps.log: Intake pipeline started for client lead...
Webhook triggered: POST AML screener on database records...
Sanction screening completed. risk_level: 'low', matches: 0.
Evaluating conditions: risk_level == 'low' (satisfied). Routing to task.
Sales Team Lead: choosing Account Representative assignment...
Rep assigned successfully. rep_id: 'usr_rep_john_doe'.
Webhook triggered: Sending Welcome Portal link details via SMTP...
SMTP Mail sent successfully. SendGrid message ID captured.
Client Intake Workflow complete. Status promoted to 'active'.

order.title: Order Entity
order.desc: Generic sales transaction order representing items purchased, net pricing totals, payment details, and fulfillment state.
order.flowDesc: Queries product databases, captures credit card payments, alerts warehouse packaging, and delivers shipping confirmation.

schema.name: client_id
schema.desc: Reference ID of purchasing client entity.

schema.name: items
schema.desc: Item list array containing skus, quantities, and pricing.

schema.name: payment_method
schema.desc: Credit card, transfer, or invoice mechanism.

nodes.label: Inventory Check
nodes.details: Fires backend API queries to verify matching skus and quantities are in stock.

nodes.label: In Stock?
nodes.details: Conditional checkout gate verifying stock levels before processing payments.

nodes.label: Charge Card
nodes.details: Submits transaction parameters to payment processor endpoints.

nodes.label: Pack & Label
nodes.details: Creates warehouse inventory picker alerts, packages matching parts, and affixes carrier labels.

nodes.label: Email Tracking
nodes.details: Sends automated order delivery updates and links to parcel status dashboards.

steps.log: Sales Order processing initialized...
Webhook triggered: Checking warehouse stock status in interior ERP databases...
Inventory matched. Stock status: 'true'.
Conditional evaluated: inv_check.in_stock == true (satisfied). Proceeding.
Webhook triggered: Capture transaction authorization via Stripe...
Transaction authorization complete: charge_id 'ch_90218_auth' capture successful.
Fulfillment Operative: Packing items and printing shipping waybill labels...
Package prepared. Carrier tracking number registered: '1Z-999-AA1-01-2345'.
Webhook triggered: Broadcasting tracking keys to purchaser inbox...
Notification successfully processed by SMTP relay.
Order fulfillment complete. Order status updated to 'shipped'.

ledger.title: Ledger Entity
ledger.desc: Financial ledger database rows recording accounting entries, descriptions, debits, and credits complying with double-entry principles.
ledger.flowDesc: Aggregates bank statements, executes automated match validation formulas, registers adjustments, and locks accounts.

schema.name: account_code
schema.desc: Target chart of accounts category code.

nodes.label: Fetch Statements
nodes.details: Downloads official banking statements via Plaid transaction matching APIs.

nodes.label: Run Matcher
nodes.details: Runs rule-based fuzzy matching algorithms correlating ledger codes with bank entries.

nodes.label: 100% Match?
nodes.details: Conditional gate checking if all bank statements reconciliated automatically.

nodes.label: Review Exceptions
nodes.details: Creates accountant exceptions reviews queues to correlate unmapped invoices manually.

nodes.label: Post Adjustments
nodes.details: Commits adjust items back into journal ledgers to resolve exceptions.

nodes.label: Lock Books
nodes.details: Locks accounting periods preventing further posts and generating ledger exports.

steps.log: Ledger monthly reconciliation process started...
Webhook triggered: pulling bank transaction statements via Plaid interface...
Statement fetch completed: parsed 42 ledger entries.
Webhook triggered: checking bank statements against records...
Reconciliation match complete. Unmapped count: 3 entries.
Evaluating conditions: auto_match.unmapped_count == 0 (unmet). Routing to exceptions.
Senior Accountant: resolving remaining bank mismatch entries...
Accountant manually mapped remaining 3 statements to chart accounts.
Webhook triggered: registering correction ledger posts...
Adjustment posts completed. Accounting records verified.
Webhook triggered: sealing period books...
Lock complete. Period sealed against editing.
Ledger reconciliation flow completed successfully.
